title.en: In the retreat, Ye Tian opened his eyes, full o...

content.en:
"Sister for help!"

In the retreat, Ye Tian opened his eyes, full of endless anger.

Swish!

Ye Tian immediately dispatched, and immediately mobilized the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm to block the human realm.

At this time, many Terrans found themselves unable to enter and exit the human realm.

"Why can't you get out?"

The Water Moon Domain Ancestor was shocked.

There are countless people coming and going in and out of the human world every day, so there are many entrances and exits.

But now, she passed through an entrance and exit, but found that she couldn't get out.

The human world is blocked!

The Water Moon Domain Ancestor was not prepared to waste time waiting, so he directly attacked the human realm barrier.

It stands to reason that no matter how powerful a world like the human world is, no matter how strong the formation is, it will be difficult to block her attack.

It should be very simple for her to leave, and she can easily break through the barriers of the world and leave.

And yet—

Bang!!!!

The Water Moon Domain Ancestor's blow hit the world barrier of the human world, causing hundreds of millions of miles of void to shake, but it still did not break the world barrier of the human world.

"Damn, the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain completely blocked the human realm so quickly, and the defenses of the human realm were so strong, how did this happen?"

The Water Moon Domain Ancestor was stunned.

She didn't know that Ye Tian could mobilize all the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and he could also mobilize the power of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, so he was blessed in the human world, which was enough to make even the four-star king unable to get out.

The Water Moon Domain Ancestor kidnapped Ye Yu, which completely angered Ye Tian, he naturally would not hide any longer, and blocked the human world as soon as possible to prevent the enemy from leaving.

......

"There is a Supreme Domain Ancestor attacking the human realm barrier, and the enemy really hasn't had time to escape!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

He was afraid that he would slow down and cause the enemy to leave.

In that case, it will be difficult for him to find the enemy.

------------------

After the Water Moon Domain Ancestor learned that he could not leave the human world, he escaped into a giant city in the human world as quickly as possible and hid.

"I sealed Ye Yu, Ye Yu can't communicate now, and it is very difficult for the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors to find me!"

The Ancestor of the Water Moon Domain thought to himself.

Right now, she can only hide first, and then think about how to leave the human world, or the members of the Ghost Fox Organization in the outside world forcibly attack the human world, and then the inside and outside should lead him away.

In short, she had to take Ye Yu out to be able to let Ye Tian's body leave the human world.

"I didn't expect the human world to be so extraordinary, fortunately, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestors didn't choose to assassinate in the human world, otherwise they would definitely fail, and even suffer heavy losses!"

Water Moon Domain Ancestral Dao.

At this time.

Ye Tian came to the place where the Water Moon Domain Ancestor bombarded the human world barrier, but he did not find any trace of the Water Moon Domain Ancestor.

"Are you hiding?"

Ye Tian sneered.

In the eyes of his talent for copying, there was no point in any hiding.

Now, Ye Tian's copying talent covers a wide range.

Wow!!!!!

A territory was shrouded in Ye Tian's copying talent, and countless creatures were found out about their talents, and Ye Tian was screened to find the location of the other party.

"Not in this area!"

Ye Tian continued to search.

Searching area by area, Ye Tian soon found it.

In a giant city called Jinguang City, the talent of a domain ancestor was revealed, and according to the introduction, the identity of the other party was known.

"Domain Ancestor of the Ghost Fox Organization!"

Ye Tian was immediately sure that the other party was the domain ancestor who had captured his sister.

He didn't make a move immediately, because he knew very well that this Supreme Domain Ancestor was not weak, and once he failed to kill this Supreme Domain Ancestor, his sister Ye Yu would be in danger.

"Judging from the previous situation when this Supreme Domain Ancestor attacked the human realm barrier, she is afraid that she has a combat power that surpasses the second grade of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, which is equivalent to the first-grade combat power of the Supreme Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian guessed.

The first-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor was also a real powerhouse in the Dark Sacred Domain, but now he came to the human world to kidnap his sister.

Obviously, someone is going to deal with him!

At this moment, Ye Tian thought of the situation of copying his body, and he was entangled by a group of domain ancestors.

At first, he wondered why those domain ancestors were looking for trouble.

Now, he understood!

"Drag my replica body with some trivial things, and then have someone kidnap my sister and lure my body out of the human world, so as to launch a deadly attack on me!"

Ye Tian guessed.

If he didn't have the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, so that he could control the power of the Xuanxu God Realm 100%, otherwise there would be no way to instantly block the human realm and make the defense of the human realm reach a very terrifying level.

It can only be said that the domain ancestors of the Ghost Fox Organization underestimated him, thus causing such a situation.

"Treat this Water Moon Domain Ancestor as a first-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian decided.

His current combat power surpassed that of the first-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor, but if it was said that it was a little difficult to kill a first-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor with one blow.

Therefore, he must use the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

"First use the Divine Suppression Technique on the Water Moon Domain Ancestor, causing a heavy blow to her soul, so that she can't attack her sister!"

Thinking about it, Ye Tian used the Suppression Divine Technique.

Cotai City.

Shuiyue Yuzu sat in a restaurant, his breath was restrained, and he didn't leak out at all, and the whole person was like a quiet and wonderful woman.

Abrupt.

A terrifying force went straight into the depths of her soul.

"Not good!"

The Water Moon Domain Ancestor was shocked.

Rumble!!!!!

The Divine Suppression Technique penetrated into the soul of the Water Moon Domain Ancestor, and although it was partially blocked by one of her top-notch soul domain weapons, there was still a part of the power that blasted into her soul origin.

Yes!!!!!

The screams came, and the soul of the Water Moon Domain Ancestor was hit hard, and the whole person was in a state of soul chaos.

At this moment, Ye Tian struck again, and as soon as he struck, it was a limit-level holy technique of void slashing, and it also blessed the soul holy light and the power of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and the power of this blow was more than ten times stronger than Ye Tian's peak attack power.

At the same time, Ye Tian also mobilized the power of the Xuanxu Holy Realm to protect the Golden Light City and prevent the Golden Light City from being destroyed.

Otherwise, if he blows down, the Golden Light City will be annihilated, and countless human beings will be turned into ashes.

Poof!

The Void Slash severed the neck of the Water Moon Domain Ancestor, and the terrifying power went straight into the soul of the Water Moon Domain Ancestor.

The Water Moon Domain Ancestor was killed by Ye Tian without any resistance, and Ye Tian moved quickly, and one hand probed into the Inner World of the Water Moon Domain Ancestor, taking advantage of the moment when the World in the Water Moon Domain Ancestor's body collapsed to bring Ye Yu out, preventing Ye Yu from being affected by the power of the Holy Technique.

Ye Yu came out, the Water Moon Domain Ancestor fell, and the matter was over.

Ye Tian lifted the seal on Ye Yu's body, and then Ye Yu spoke: "Brother, I was arrested just now!"

"It's okay, the man is dead!

Ye Tian didn't care whether Ye Yu agreed or not, and forcibly took Ye Yu back with a few domain ancestors, and didn't let her go out during this time.

In addition, Ye Tian also told his family not to leave the human world.

After doing all this, Ye Tian's gaze looked beyond the human world.

"Ghost Fox Organization, you are looking for death!"

Ye Tian said coldly.
